/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/copy2plus_boot_dump.dir/copy2plus_boot_dump.cpp.o CMakeFiles/copy2plus_boot_dump.dir/__/ClockCard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/copy2plus_boot_dump.dir/__/DiskImage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/copy2plus_boot_dump.dir/__/DiskIICard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/copy2plus_boot_dump.dir/__/Disassembler6502.cpp.o CMakeFiles/copy2plus_boot_dump.dir/__/ProDOSHardDiskCard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/copy2plus_boot_dump.dir/__/ProDOSVolume.cpp.o CMakeFiles/copy2plus_boot_dump.dir/__/M6502.cpp.o CMakeFiles/copy2plus_boot_dump.dir/__/Memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/copy2plus_boot_dump.dir/__/SlotBus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/copy2plus_boot_dump.dir/__/CassetteDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/copy2plus_boot_dump.dir/__/AudioDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/copy2plus_boot_dump.dir/__/RomLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/copy2plus_boot_dump.dir/__/SnapshotIO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/copy2plus_boot_dump.dir/__/SpeakerDevice.cpp.o -o copy2plus_boot_dump  -ldl -lm
